title: Larae Barrett
summary: The former Rikers leader whose death leaves the faction leaderless and divided into multiple sub-groups.

claims.text: The official faction recap says Larae Barrett led the Rikers' campaign of vengeance and destruction after Green Poison struck.
The Division killed Barrett, leaving the Rikers leaderless and causing the faction to split into multiple sub-groups.

paragraphs.text: Barrett's death is the turning point between the first game's unified Rikers and the splinter groups encountered later, including James Dragov's Lower Manhattan force.

verification.notes: The title follows the established character spelling; one recap body renders the surname as Barret.
